title: Actions&Mods[NOT RELEVANT!]
description: Action and Mods by tomatow3 is a client-side Minecraft 1.21.5 modpack that reimagines the vanilla experience with enhanced optimization, stunning graphics, and new adventures, balancing performance and visual quality for both single-player and multiplayer
body:
Of course, here's a shortened and formatted version:

# Action and Mods by tomatow3 — Minecraft 1.21.5

This collection offers a **reinvention of vanilla Minecraft**, retaining the atmosphere of the original, but adding dozens of improvements: from deep optimization to new visual effects, animations and adventures. The build remains **client-side** and is suitable for both single-player and server-side play.

---

## 🔧 Optimization and performance

* **Sodium, Lithium, C2ME** — the basis for stable FPS, acceleration of logic and loading chunks.
* **Bobby + Distant Horizons** — drawing the world ** thousands of blocks ahead**.
* **EntityCulling, ImmediatelyFast** — acceleration of rendering by hiding invisible objects.

---

## 🌄 Graphics and atmosphere

* **Iris Shaders** — shader support.
* **LambDynamicLights, Better Clouds** — dynamic lighting and realistic sky.
* **Sound Physics Remastered, Presence Footsteps** — realistic acoustics and new sounds.

---

## 🎥 Animations and interface

* **Not Enough Animations, Fresh Animations** — live animations of characters and mobs.
* **Shoulder Surfing, Hold My Items** — new camera angles and animations.
* **Better F3, Status Effect Bars, Xaero's Minimap** — improved and user-friendly interface.

---

## 🎒 Convenience

* **Inventory Profiles Next, Shulker Box Tooltip** — convenient inventory management.
* **Cherished Worlds, Better Saved Hotbars** — Quick access to worlds and item sets.

---

## 🏰 Adventures and Content

* **Blaze and Caves** — large-scale cave renovation.
*   **Travels & Dungeons (datapacks)** — New locations to explore.

---

## 📌 Result

**Action and Mods by tomatow3** is **familiar Minecraft on a whole new level**:

* High FPS and smoothness.
* Beautiful graphics and lively atmosphere.
* User-friendly interface and new adventures.

Immerse yourself in the updated Minecraft world!
